history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, selfie-style portrait of a young East Asian woman with long, dark, slightly messy hair, partially obscured by the hood of a light gray zip-up hoodie. She has large, expressive dark eyes, delicate features, and pink lips. Two light blue star-shaped stickers are visible on her cheek and chin. She is wearing a white top with a ruffled neckline. The hoodie is a soft, textured fabric, with a black tag featuring white text visible on the edge of the hood. The background consists of a textured gray curtain. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a gentle glow on her face and highlighting the details of her skin and hair. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by grays, whites, and the natural tones of her skin and hair, with the small blue stars providing subtle pops of color. The mood is intimate, slightly melancholic, and youthful. The image has a soft focus, giving it a dreamy, aesthetic quality.
